name: Amphoreus RPG
description:
Welcome to Amphoreus! An ancient Greece style world on the edge of the apocalypse, populated by heroes, gods, mythical creatures and races, and filled with intrigue and magic.

This is an RPG bot designed to simulate a tabletop experience. This bot contains Castorice, Anaxa, Mydei, Phainon, Aglaea, Tribbie, Cipher, Hyacine, Hysilens, Cerydra, Lygus/Lycurgus and Flame Reaver. The characters are not as fleshed out as my full bots, due to limitations in size of the bot. This bot may be more heavily edited in the future to refine it's scenarios as I work out the finer details. I hope you enjoy! 🥰

TW: May contain non-con and violence. User has a chance of being killed.

User can be anything/anyone.

Interested in this scenario but slightly.. sillier? Check out Amphoreus RPG - Unhinged

Art by lulu8930430.
